chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-854 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Abro, Deputy Attorney General ************** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. This petition was lastly taken up 16.05.2023, wherein notices were ordered to be issued, thereafter no efforts were made by the petitioner to proceed with the matter. It appears that petitioner is not interested to pursue the instant petition. In the circumstance, present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with the pending application. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
